sys_ui_script.description: Shows the Now Assist Panel (if it is not yet visible) if the current user is entitled to use it. If a conversation Sys Id is given, the function attempts to show the given conversation. If not it just shows the panel with the latest conversation used by the user. A colleague suggested this would work: window.aiex.launch({"conversationId": strConversationSysId }); But it doesn't. This code is fully AI generated (ChatGPT 5.2 Thinking)
sys_ui_script.name: x_snc_devtools.ShowNowAssistPanel
